## Summary

Describe the change and the human-impact construct or problem it addresses.

## Validation

- [ ] `pytest`
- [ ] `ruff check .`
- [ ] Scenario JSONL validates, if changed
- [ ] English and Vietnamese pairs remain aligned, if changed

## Research and safety checks

- [ ] I made no causal human-impact claim from transcript ratings alone.
- [ ] I included no private conversations or identifying personal data.
- [ ] I disclosed machine-generated scenarios or translations.
- [ ] I documented participant ethics and privacy protections, if applicable.
